results.title: Randomness → the Bell Curve
results.description: Monte Carlo → walks → Galton → CLT → Bayes.

checks.notes: Randomness, from coin flips to the bell curve — Kevin Arifin
Course module does not require a stage screenshot
Course module links out to lessons
Static/module page does not need Reset
Modules — multi-lesson deep dives: Course · 5 lessons
Course module uses accessible lesson links
Course module links are keyboard reachable

layout.title: Randomness, from coin flips to the bell curve — Kevin Arifin
layout.h1: Randomness, from coin flips to the bell curve
layout.lead: Five interactive lessons, in order. Each one is a single idea you can poke; together they build from "a coin flip" up to why the bell curve is everywhere and how evidence should change your mind. Do them top to bottom.

mobileLayout.title: Randomness, from coin flips to the bell curve — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.h1: Randomness, from coin flips to the bell curve
mobileLayout.lead: Five interactive lessons, in order. Each one is a single idea you can poke; together they build from "a coin flip" up to why the bell curve is everywhere and how evidence should change your mind. Do them top to bottom.

results.title: Why the Moon Has Phases
results.description: Ciechanowski-style: drag the Moon, watch the phase.

checks.notes: Why the Moon Has Phases — Kevin Arifin

layout.title: Why the Moon Has Phases — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: A recreation in the spirit of Bartosz Ciechanowski — build the idea one step at a time, then drag the Moon yourself. The left view looks down on the orbit; the inset is what you'd see from Earth. Canvas 2D · astronomy.

results.title: The Road to Serfdom
results.description: Hayek's argument as an interactive book.

checks.notes: The Road to Serfdom — Kevin Arifin

layout.title: The Road to Serfdom — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: An interactive reading of Hayek's argument (after the 1945 comic): how central planning trades freedom for control. Scroll the story, then take the dial. Canvas 2D · ideas.

results.title: Ripple Tank
results.description: Two-source wave interference; drag a source.

checks.notes: Ripple tank interference field with two draggable sources

layout.title: Ripple Tank — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Two wave sources interfering. Drag a source to move it and watch the pattern shift. Canvas 2D with per-pixel field rendering.
layout.readout: Drag either dot. Bright bands = constructive interference, dark = destructive.
layout.stageAria: Ripple tank interference field with two draggable sources

mobileLayout.title: Ripple Tank — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.lead: Two wave sources interfering. Drag a source to move it and watch the pattern shift. Canvas 2D with per-pixel field rendering.
mobileLayout.readout: Drag either dot. Bright bands = constructive interference, dark = destructive.

results.title: Coulomb's Law
results.description: Drag charges and watch inverse-square forces.

checks.notes: Two draggable point charges in their electric field with force arrows

layout.title: Coulomb's Law — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Drag the two charges. The force grows not linearly but with 1/r² — move them twice as close and it gets four times stronger. Flip a sign to switch attract/repel. Canvas 2D · physics.
layout.readout: Separation r = 48 · force 3.9 (relative), attracting. Halve r → 4× the force.
layout.stageAria: Two draggable point charges in their electric field with force arrows

mobileLayout.title: Coulomb's Law — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.lead: Drag the two charges. The force grows not linearly but with 1/r² — move them twice as close and it gets four times stronger. Flip a sign to switch attract/repel. Canvas 2D · physics.
mobileLayout.readout: Separation r = 48 · force 3.9 (relative), attracting. Halve r → 4× the force.
mobileLayout.stageAria: Two draggable point charges in their electric field with force arrows

results.title: Pendulum
results.description: Damped pendulum; drag the bob to set the angle.

layout.title: Pendulum — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: A damped pendulum. Drag the bob to set its angle, then let go. SVG — crisp vector geometry and a live label.
layout.stageAria: Damped pendulum with draggable bob

mobileLayout.title: Pendulum — Kevin Arifin

results.title: Double Pendulum
results.description: Deterministic physics, chaotic motion.

checks.notes: Chaotic double pendulum tracing its tip

layout.title: Double Pendulum — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Two arms, fully deterministic physics — yet a hair's difference in the start explodes into a totally different path. The classic picture of chaos. Canvas 2D · physics.
layout.stageAria: Chaotic double pendulum tracing its tip

mobileLayout.title: Double Pendulum — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.lead: Two arms, fully deterministic physics — yet a hair's difference in the start explodes into a totally different path. The classic picture of chaos. Canvas 2D · physics.
mobileLayout.stageAria: Chaotic double pendulum tracing its tip

results.title: Countersteering a Bike
results.description: Wrong-way steering creates the lean that starts a turn.

checks.notes: Top-down bicycle path with a synced lean meter showing countersteer, lean, then turn

layout.title: Countersteering a Bike — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: The strange riding fact: to start a left turn, a moving bicycle first steers a little right. That wrong-way twitch moves the tire contact patch out from under the rider, creating the lean that becomes the turn. Canvas 2D · bicycle dynamics.
layout.stageAria: Top-down bicycle path with a synced lean meter showing countersteer, lean, then turn

mobileLayout.title: Countersteering a Bike — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.lead: The strange riding fact: to start a left turn, a moving bicycle first steers a little right. That wrong-way twitch moves the tire contact patch out from under the rider, creating the lean that becomes the turn. Canvas 2D · bicycle dynamics.
mobileLayout.stageAria: Top-down bicycle path with a synced lean meter showing countersteer, lean, then turn

results.title: MDP Gridworld
results.description: Value iteration diffuses rewards into a policy.

checks.notes: Markov decision process gridworld values and policy arrows

layout.title: MDP Gridworld — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Rewards diffuse backward through a stochastic grid as value iteration improves the policy. Paint walls or rewards, then step the Bellman update. Canvas 2D · AI.

results.title: SIR Epidemic
results.description: Transmission and recovery shape an epidemic curve.

layout.title: SIR Epidemic — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: A compartment model from differential equations: susceptible people become infected, then recover. Tune transmission, recovery, and vaccination to flatten the curve. Canvas 2D · systems biology.
layout.readout: day 7.1 · infected 7.9% · peak 7.9% on day 7 · R0 3.71, Re 2.85
layout.stageAria: SIR epidemic curves

results.title: PID Control
results.description: Tune feedback gains to reach a moving target.

checks.notes: PID control cart and error plot

layout.title: PID Control — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Tune proportional, integral, and derivative feedback on a cart trying to reach a target. Too little gain is sluggish; too much can ring or blow up. Canvas 2D · control systems.

results.title: Gillespie Birth-Death
results.description: Stochastic event paths versus smooth expectation.

results.description: Base rates explain why false positives dominate.

checks.notes: Bayes theorem base-rate grid and confusion matrix

results.title: 800 VDC Power Delivery
results.description: Higher voltage cuts current and busbar heat.

checks.notes: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC — Kevin Arifin
Power busbar feeding a GPU rack; thickness is copper, glow is heat loss

layout.title: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC — Kevin Arifin
layout.h1: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC
layout.lead: A fixed power load at a higher voltage draws less current — and resistive heat falls with the square of current. Pick a bus voltage and watch the busbar. Canvas 2D · AI infrastructure.
layout.readout: At 48 V, a 120 kW rack pulls 2,500 A · busbar wastes 9,375 W (7.81%) as heat · needs 278× the copper of an 800 V bus.
layout.stageAria: Power busbar feeding a GPU rack; thickness is copper, glow is heat loss

mobileLayout.title: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.h1: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC
mobileLayout.lead: A fixed power load at a higher voltage draws less current — and resistive heat falls with the square of current. Pick a bus voltage and watch the busbar. Canvas 2D · AI infrastructure.
mobileLayout.readout: At 48 V, a 120 kW rack pulls 2,500 A · busbar wastes 9,375 W (7.81%) as heat · needs 278× the copper of an 800 V bus.
mobileLayout.stageAria: Power busbar feeding a GPU rack; thickness is copper, glow is heat loss

results.title: Gears
results.description: Lit 3D teeth set the ratio: trade speed for torque.

checks.notes: Two meshing 3D gears, lit and shadowed

layout.title: Gears — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Two meshing gears must move the same teeth per second, so the small one spins faster — trading speed for torque. Re-tooth either gear and watch the ratio. Drag to orbit. three.js · mechanisms.
layout.readout: Ratio 20:12 = 1.67× — driven turns 1.67× slower, with 1.67× the torque.
layout.stageAria: Two meshing 3D gears, lit and shadowed

mobileLayout.title: Gears — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.lead: Two meshing gears must move the same teeth per second, so the small one spins faster — trading speed for torque. Re-tooth either gear and watch the ratio. Drag to orbit. three.js · mechanisms.

mobileLayout.stageAria: Two meshing 3D gears, lit and shadowed

results.title: How GPS Finds You
results.description: Distance rings trilaterate your position.

checks.notes: How GPS Finds You — Kevin Arifin
Satellites with distance rings intersecting at the receiver's position

layout.title: How GPS Finds You — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: In the spirit of Ciechanowski's GPS. Each satellite tells you your distance to it — a ring of possible positions. Stack enough rings and only one point fits. Drag the satellites or the receiver. Canvas 2D · signals.
layout.readout: Three+ satellites: the rings pin a single point — your location.
layout.stageAria: Satellites with distance rings intersecting at the receiver's position

mobileLayout.title: How GPS Finds You — Kevin Arifin

mobileLayout.readout: Three+ satellites: the rings pin a single point — your location.

results.title: Why Eclipses Are Rare
results.description: Phase plus orbital nodes explains eclipse seasons.

checks.notes: Why Eclipses Are Rare — Kevin Arifin
Top-down Sun Earth Moon geometry synced with a side view of the Moon orbit tilt and eclipse nodes

layout.title: Why Eclipses Are Rare — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: A companion to Moon phases. New moon and full moon happen every month, but eclipses do not, because the Moon's orbit is tilted. Eclipses only happen when the Moon is both in the right phase and near a node where its tilted path crosses the Sun-Earth plane. Canvas 2D · astronomy.
layout.readout: new moon · height 0.0 lunar radii · ordinary month: no eclipse
layout.stageAria: Top-down Sun Earth Moon geometry synced with a side view of the Moon orbit tilt and eclipse nodes

mobileLayout.title: Why Eclipses Are Rare — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.lead: A companion to Moon phases. New moon and full moon happen every month, but eclipses do not, because the Moon's orbit is tilted. Eclipses only happen when the Moon is both in the right phase and near a node where its tilted path crosses the Sun-Earth plane. Canvas 2D · astronomy.
mobileLayout.readout: new moon · height 0.1 lunar radii · solar eclipse possible
mobileLayout.stageAria: Top-down Sun Earth Moon geometry synced with a side view of the Moon orbit tilt and eclipse nodes

results.title: 3D Look Template
results.description: Lit, shadowed, antialiased 3D — the premium recipe.

checks.notes: A lit, shadowed 3D object you can orbit

layout.title: 3D Look Template — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: The premium-3D recipe that closes most of the gap to Ciechanowski's look — antialiasing, soft contact shadows, hemisphere + key/fill lighting, a matte material, and tone mapping, all procedural (no model files). Copy this to start any lit 3D sim; drag to orbit. three.js.
layout.readout: The look = MSAA + shadow-catching ground + 3-light setup + ACES tone mapping. Geometry is built in code, like his.
layout.stageAria: A lit, shadowed 3D object you can orbit

mobileLayout.title: 3D Look Template — Kevin Arifin

mobileLayout.readout: The look = MSAA + shadow-catching ground + 3-light setup + ACES tone mapping. Geometry is built in code, like his.
